body:
## Problem

The scrum-master playbook (steps 7a and 10a) stamps story points and the workflow-mode custom field with:

```bash
acli jira workitem edit --key "<KEY>" --custom-field "<name>" --value <points> --yes
```

**That flag does not exist in any acli version** (verified through 1.3.22, the current latest):

- `acli jira workitem edit --help` lists only summary / description / labels / assignee / type
- the `--from-json` schema exposes no custom fields
- `acli jira field update` edits field *definitions*, not values

So every points/workflow stamp silently failed, and triage/decompose runs report "points not set — manual entry needed" on every story.

## Fix

- **New `scripts/jira-set-field.sh`** — sets a field by *display name* via the Jira REST API (resolves the field id from `/rest/api/3/field`, then `PUT /rest/api/3/issue/<KEY>`). Auth uses the same `ATLASSIAN_SITE` / `ATLASSIAN_EMAIL` / `ATLASSIAN_API_TOKEN` env contract the acli skill already documents for headless auth. Exits 2 when credentials are absent, 3 when the field name doesn't resolve — so callers keep the existing best-effort semantics (warn, never fail the run over points). `option` value-type handles single-select fields and falls back to plain string on HTTP 400.
- **scrum-master steps 7a & 10a** — stamp via the helper; probe `Story point estimate` then `Story Points` using exit code 3.
- **acli skill** — documents the custom-field limitation and points at the helper.
- Plugin version → **0.24.1**.

## Testing

- `bash -n` clean on the new script.
- REST flow (field-id lookup by display name + PUT with number value) verified manually against a live Jira Cloud site.

reviews.body: ## Pull request overview This PR fixes Jira story-points and workflow-mode custom-field stamping in the SDLC plugin by replacing a nonexistent `acli jira workitem edit --custom-field ...` usage with a REST-based helper script, and updates the relevant playbook/docs accordingly. **Changes:** - Add `jira-set-field.sh` to set Jira fields by display name via Jira Cloud REST API (field-id lookup + issue update). - Update scrum-master playbook and the acli skill docs to use/document the REST helper for custom-field values. - Bump plugin version to `0.24.1`. ### Reviewed changes Copilot reviewed 4 out of 4 changed files in this pull request and generated 5 comments. | File | Description | | ---- | ----------- | | plugins/sdlc/skills/acli/SKILL.md | Documents that acli can’t set custom-field values and points users to the REST helper. | | plugins/sdlc/scripts/jira-set-field.sh | New REST helper script for stamping Jira fields by display name. | | plugins/sdlc/agents/scrum-master.md | Updates steps 7a/10a to stamp Story Points and AI Workflow via the REST helper. | | plugins/sdlc/.claude-plugin/plugin.json | Version bump to 0.24.1. | --- 💡 Add Copilot custom instructions for smarter, more guided reviews. Learn how to get started.
